pi_items.source: Found in setup_task.sh where it creates the directory and in export_result.sh where it evaluates the generated file.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires generating a PsychoPy experiment saved to /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/mental_rotation/mental_rotation.psyexp. A synthetic conditions file is generated during task setup at /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/mental_rotation/conditions.csv.
